PixMidas

About PixMidas

PixMidas is a growing collection of free online tools built to make everyday digital tasks faster, easier and less confusing.

What we do

PixMidas offers lightweight browser-based tools for common tasks like compressing images, resizing photos, converting files, generating QR codes, counting words and comparing text. New tools are added regularly.

Private by design

Whenever possible, PixMidas tools run directly inside your browser. This means many files are processed locally on your own device without being uploaded to any external server. Your content stays yours.

Simple tools that just work

No unnecessary accounts. No complicated software. No confusing steps. Just clean, fast tools for small digital problems that come up every day.

Always free

Every tool on PixMidas is free to use. No subscription, no payment, no hidden limits. We are supported by non-intrusive advertising.

Currently in beta

PixMidas is actively being developed. Some tools may still be improved or expanded over time. If you find a bug or have a suggestion, we would love to hear from you.

Explore all tools Get in touch

⚡ PixMidas

Free browser-based tools. No login required. Runs locally in your browser.

© 2026 PixMidas. All rights reserved.

Privacy Note & Disclaimer

PixMidas is designed to process files directly in your browser whenever possible, and we do not intentionally store or inspect your files. However, no online service can guarantee absolute security, so please avoid highly sensitive data. By using PixMidas, you acknowledge that files are processed at your own discretion and risk.

Learn more
